# task\-audit\-fix\-core\-bugs — Fix core correctness bugs found in code audit
status: done  priority: 1  scope: scope-core
readiness: not_eligible  reason: status_done

Fix four correctness bugs identified in the code audit:

1\. \*\*RecordError code in messages\.ts:50\*\* — loadMessages throws RecordError without the code arg, defaulting to "invalid\_json" instead of "schema\_invalid"\. All other loaders pass "schema\_invalid" correctly\.

2\. \*\*since\-cursor timestamp comparison\*\* — messages\.ts:133 and ledgerIndex\.ts:144 use string comparison on ISO timestamps\. If timestamps carry different UTC offsets \(e\.g\. \+03:00 vs Z\), the ordering is wrong\. Parse to Date before comparing\.

3\. \*\*Dead void import\*\* — messages\.ts:145 has \`void activeClaimForTask;\` to suppress unused\-import warning\. Remove the import entirely\.

4\. \*\*mutate\.ts:37\*\* — Error message "no such task \(as JSON\)" leaks an implementation detail to the user\. Remove "\(as JSON\)"\.

## Acceptance
- loadMessages throws RecordError with code 'schema\_invalid' for schema\-invalid messages\.
- since\-cursor comparison uses Date\.parse\(\) in both messages\.ts and ledgerIndex\.ts\.
- No dead void import remains in messages\.ts\.
- mutate\.ts error message does not contain '\(as JSON\)'\.
- All existing tests still pass\.
